headline: AMD, Cerebras Strike AI Chip Deals
summary: Advanced Micro Devices and Cerebras Systems on Wednesday separately announced partnerships related to their AI chips. AMD stock and Cerebras stock rose on the news as semiconductor stocks overall advanced.

headline: QUALCOMM (QCOM) Stock Looks Below Fair Value On Earnings Yet Near Fair Value On Cash Flow
summary: QUALCOMM’s valuation is caught between a solid three year gain of 48.1% and a current picture where the stock screens as roughly in line with its Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value, while earnings based multiples still lean towards an undervalued read. After the recent pullback, the issue for investors is whether that mix adds up to enough margin of safety at around US$173.50 per share. QUALCOMM has returned 48.1% over three years, which suggests investors have already priced in a...
